character.name: Final Fantasy Tactics Advance GBA
character.prompt:
Final Fantasy Tactics Advance GBA style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions with rounded soft body shape,
large head with big oval eyes and tiny pupils, soft pastel sprite shading,
long silver hair flowing past shoulders, side bangs framing face, head bare,
wearing flowing white and pale blue robe with crimson trim and small gold buckle accents,
delicate silver shoulder guards with rounded edges,
soft turquoise cape with white inner lining draped behind to mid-calf,
loose hood fabric folded flat at upper back behind neck, never on head,
slim wooden staff with glowing pale sapphire orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with small ornament,
young woman early 20s, gentle whimsical pose with slight side tilt,
GBA era pixel art, soft pastel storybook palette,
rounded clean lineart, fairy tale atmosphere, sharp readable silhouette
